title: Semantic Building Model (SBM) Schema v2.4.0
description: Complete semantic model for architectural building information. 34 entity types — v2.3's 31 plus three v2.4 additions introducing the delivery & approval process layer ('how the building gets built'): permit (regulatory authorizations/decisions — zoning, building permit, notification, occupancy, completion notice, heritage/environmental, with issuing authority + statutory deadlines), approval_gate (phase-gate go/no-go milestones with prerequisite checklists), and regulatory_inspection (statutory periodic inspections with c-KOB digital-logbook linkage). Schema bump is additive: any v2.3-conforming model is also v2.4-conforming.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when this SBM was generated

phase.description: Current lifecycle phase. Canonical form is a unified phase name; a legacy numeric phase (1-8) is still accepted and mapped for back-compat.

projectPhase.description: Named project phase (unified lifecycle vocabulary v2.0)

departments.description: Functional departments within the building. Referenced by departmentId on space entities.

sources.description: Project-level document sources referenced by entity _meta fields

constructionPackages.description: DEPRECATED in v1.1: Use standalone construction_package entities instead. Legacy inline construction work packages for phased delivery.

name.description: Package name (e.g., Structure, Envelope, MEP, Finishes)

costSummary.description: Auto-computed: aggregated costs from entities in this package

zone_types.description: Zone type definitions (templates for zone instances)

space_types.description: Space type definitions (templates for space instances)

system_types.description: System type definitions (templates for system instances)

envelopes.description: Building envelope elements (walls, roofs, slabs, curtain walls)

vertical_circulations.description: Vertical circulation elements (staircases, elevators, ramps, escalators)

opening_types.description: Opening type definitions (templates for opening instances)

openings.description: Opening elements (windows, doors, skylights) within envelope elements

site_feature_types.description: Site feature type definitions (templates for site feature instances)

site_features.description: Site feature elements (landscape, parking, green infrastructure)

construction_packages.description: Construction work packages for phased delivery (promoted from project-level in v1.1)

material_types.description: Material type definitions — reusable material specifications (v2.0)

materials.description: Material instances used in envelope layers, finishes, and structural elements (v2.0)

structural_systems.description: Structural system entities with load paths, foundations, and seismic design (v2.0)

issues.description: Construction administration issues: RFIs, change orders, submittals, inspections, punch list items (v2.0)

circulation_routes.description: Egress and accessibility circulation routes connecting spaces (v2.0)

telemetry_streams.description: Time-series telemetry streams from BMS, sub-meters, IoT devices (v2.2)

regulatory_inspections.description: Statutory periodic inspections with c-KOB logbook linkage (v2.4)

confidence.description: Confidence level for data provenance tracking

meta.description: Simplified provenance annotation for v0.4 cost/simulation _meta fields

finishSpec.description: A finish specification: either a simple string or a structured object with material properties.

environmentalConditionsSpec.description: Environmental conditions specification. Covers temperature, humidity, ventilation, air quality, and pressure management.

shieldingSpec.description: Shielding requirements for radiological protection, RF interference, and acoustic isolation.

fieldMeta.description: Provenance annotation for any field. For a field named X, a companion X_meta object tracks data origin and confidence.

documentSource.description: A document used as a data source for entity fields.

qualitySummary.description: Compiler-generated quality summary for an entity.

buildableArea.description: Buildable area after setbacks in m²

siteFeatureIds.description: Auto-computed: site features on this site

siteConstraints.description: Zoning setbacks, easements, heritage buffers, etc.

utilities.description: Available utility connections at site boundary

elevation.description: Site elevation in m above sea level

envelope.description: A building envelope element: walls, roofs, floor slabs, curtain walls. Connects two boundary spaces and captures construction layers, thermal/acoustic/fire performance.

boundarySpaceIds.description: Space IDs on each side of this element (1 for external, 2 for internal)

isExternal.description: True if this element is part of the building exterior envelope

isLoadBearing.description: True if this element has structural function

grossArea.description: Gross area in m² (before opening deductions)

netArea.description: Net area in m² (after opening deductions)

fireClass.description: Euroclass fire reaction (A1, A2, B, C, D, E, F)

thermalBridgePsi.description: Linear thermal bridge coefficient in W/(m·K)

rw.description: Weighted sound reduction index in dB

impactSoundLn.description: Impact sound level Ln,w in dB (for floors)

openingIds.description: Auto-computed: opening entities within this envelope element

openings.description: DEPRECATED in v1.1: Use standalone opening entities instead. Inline windows, doors, and other openings.

vertical_circulation.description: A vertical circulation element connecting levels: staircases, elevators, ramps, escalators. Captures capacity, accessibility, fire escape properties, and egress calculations.

circulationType.description: Classification of the vertical circulation element

servedSpaceIds.description: Space IDs of lobbies, landings, or vestibules served by this element

isFireEscape.description: True if this element serves as a designated fire escape route

isAccessible.description: True if this element meets accessibility requirements (wheelchair, mobility impaired)

isStretcher.description: True if this element can accommodate a stretcher (hospital/care buildings)

isEvacuationLift.description: True if this elevator is rated for evacuation use

fireProperties.description: Fire safety properties for escape routes

pressurization.description: True if staircase has positive pressure ventilation

emergencyLighting.description: True if equipped with emergency lighting

maxTravelDistance.description: Maximum travel distance to this escape in meters

vestibuleRequired.description: True if a fire vestibule/lobby is required before entry

dimensions.description: Physical dimensions of the circulation element

flightWidth.description: Stair flight / ramp width in mm

flightWidthRequired.description: Required minimum width per regulation in mm

numberOfSteps.description: Total number of steps per level

pitDepth.description: Pit depth below lowest stop in mm (elevators)

overrun.description: Overrun height above highest stop in mm (elevators)

doorWidth.description: Door clear opening width in mm

doorHeight.description: Door clear opening height in mm

tactileWarnings.description: Tactile warning strips at top/bottom of stairs

contrastNosings.description: Contrasting step nosings for visual impairment

turningCircle.description: Wheelchair turning circle diameter in mm

egressCapacity.description: Egress calculation data for fire safety

occupantCapacity.description: Number of occupants this element can evacuate per flow

building.description: A physical building structure on a site. Extended in v2.0 with comprehensive architectural, structural, and sustainability properties required for feasibility, zoning compliance, and building code analysis.

grossFloorArea.description: Gross Floor Area (GFA/PUB) in m² — total area of all floors measured to external walls (v2.0)

netFloorArea.description: Net Floor Area (NFA/PUM) in m² — usable area excluding structure, walls, circulation (v2.0)

rentableArea.description: Rentable area in m² — for commercial/office buildings (v2.0)

footprintArea.description: Building footprint area in m² — ground floor projection (v2.0)

buildingHeight.description: Total building height in m — from ground level to highest point (v2.0)

eaveHeight.description: Eave/parapet height in m — for zoning compliance (v2.0)

floorAreaRatio.description: Floor Area Ratio (FAR/intensywność zabudowy) — GFA divided by site area (v2.0)

buildingCoverageRatio.description: Building Coverage Ratio (BCR) — footprint divided by site area (v2.0)

occupancyClassification.description: Building code occupancy classification (v2.0). Use Polish ZL categories for Poland, or IBC Use Groups internationally.

constructionClass.description: Fire resistance construction class (v2.0). Per Polish WT 2021 or IBC Type I-V.

perM2KgCO2e.description: Embodied carbon per m² GFA in kgCO2e/m²

typicalCeilingHeight.description: Default clear ceiling height for spaces on this level.

typicalFinishes.description: Default finish specifications for spaces on this level.

typicalEnvironmentalConditions.description: Default environmental conditions for spaces on this level.

levelRequirements.description: Requirements that apply to all spaces on this level. Merged with space-specific requirements.

levelId.description: Primary level (used for inheritance and cost rollup)

levelIds.description: All levels this space spans (for atriums, voids, double-height rooms). Includes levelId. Auto-computed as [levelId] if not provided

isMultiLevel.description: Auto-computed: true if space spans multiple levels

lifecycleState.description: Entity lifecycle state — unified with project phases (v2.0). Legacy values (planned, design) accepted for backward compatibility.

parentSystemId.description: Reference to parent system for hierarchical decomposition

subsystemIds.description: Auto-computed: IDs of child systems that reference this system as parentSystemId

operationalHistory.description: Operation-phase asset history (v2.2). Time-keyed records of runtime hours, service events, and performance trends over an asset's life. Used by the operation-phase compliance + asset-register targets.

cycleCount.description: Cumulative on-off cycle count where applicable

performanceTrend.description: Performance drift relative to baseline / design target. Asset-type-specific subfields permitted via additionalProperties.

dataSource.description: Reference to underlying telemetry (file path, telemetry_stream id, or external system)

activeIssueIds.description: Operation-phase issues currently affecting this asset (v2.2)

opening_type.description: Opening type definition: a template/product specification for windows, doors, skylights, etc. Instances reference this via openingTypeId to inherit common properties.

rw.description: Weighted sound reduction index in dB

opening.description: An opening element (window, door, skylight) within an envelope element. Promoted from inline envelope.openings[] to first-class entity in v1.1.

openingTypeId.description: Reference to opening_type for inherited specifications

levelId.description: Level where this opening is located

spaceIds.description: Spaces accessed through this opening (1 for external, 2 for internal)

sillHeight.description: Sill height from floor finish in mm

rw.description: Weighted sound reduction index in dB

visionPanelHeight.description: Vision panel zone height in mm

site_feature_type.description: Site feature type definition: a template for landscape elements, parking, green infrastructure. Instances reference this via siteFeatureTypeId.

featureCategory.description: Classification of the site feature type

dimensions.description: Typical dimensions for this feature type

site_feature.description: A site feature: landscape element, parking area, green infrastructure, fencing, drainage, etc. References a parent site and optionally a site_feature_type.

siteFeatureTypeId.description: Reference to site_feature_type for inherited specifications

zone.description: Zone within the site (e.g., north garden, entrance)

construction_package.description: A construction work package for phased delivery. Promoted from project-level inline array to first-class entity in v1.1. Entities reference this via constructionPackageId.

packageName.description: Human-readable package name (e.g., Structure, Envelope, MEP, Finishes)

lag.description: Lag in working days (positive = delay, negative = lead)

costBreakdown.description: Detailed cost breakdown for this package

costSummary.description: Auto-computed: aggregated costs from entities assigned to this package

assignedEntityIds.description: Auto-computed: entity IDs with constructionPackageId referencing this package

buildingId.description: Optional: building this package is scoped to

phase.description: Unified lifecycle phases (v2.0). Legacy values (schematic, construction_documentation, as_built) accepted for backward compatibility.

idsMapping.description: IDS mapping for BIM requirement checking

bcfTemplate.description: BCF issue template for BIM integration

classificationRef.description: Standard classification system references (v2.0). Optional on all entities for interoperability with specification and cost systems.

responsibilityRef.description: Stakeholder responsibility assignment (v2.0). Tracks discipline ownership and responsible party.

revisionEntry.description: Entity revision history entry (v2.0). Tracks changes over time within the compiled model.

phase.description: Project phase when revision was made

campus.description: A campus or development entity for multi-site, multi-building projects (v2.0). Aggregates sites, shared infrastructure, and campus-wide systems.

siteIds.description: Auto-computed: sites belonging to this campus

totalGFA.description: Total gross floor area across all buildings in m²

space_program.description: Quantitative space programming entity (v2.0). Defines required quantities and areas per space type before design. Used for brief-to-design compliance checking.

requiredQuantity.description: Number of spaces required by the brief

designedQuantity.description: Auto-computed: number of designed space instances matching this program

requiredTotalArea.description: Required total area for all instances in m²

designedTotalArea.description: Auto-computed: sum of designed space areas

material_type.description: Material type definition (v2.0): a reusable material specification referenced by envelope layers, finishes, and structural elements. Enables procurement aggregation and sustainability tracking.

reactionToFire.description: Euroclass fire reaction (A1, A2-s1d0, B-s2d0, etc.)

certifications.description: e.g., FSC, Cradle to Cradle, Blue Angel

material.description: Material instance (v2.0): a specific application of a material type in the project. Tracks quantity, location, and procurement status.

application.description: Where/how this material is used (e.g., external wall insulation, floor finish)

appliedToEntityIds.description: Entity IDs where this material is applied (envelope, space finishes, etc.)

structural_system.description: Structural system entity (v2.0): describes the building's structural configuration, load paths, and design parameters. Covers foundations, superstructure, and lateral system.

systemName.description: Human-readable name (e.g., Main Structure, Foundation System)

parentStructuralSystemId.description: Reference to parent structural system for hierarchy

importanceClass.description: Eurocode consequence class (CC1-CC3) or importance category

exposureClass.description: Concrete exposure class (e.g., XC1, XC2, XD1)

xSpacing.description: Grid spacing in X direction in m

ySpacing.description: Grid spacing in Y direction in m

materialTypeIds.description: References to material_type entities used in this system

servedLevelIds.description: Levels served by this structural system

issue.description: Construction administration issue entity (v2.0): covers RFIs, change orders, submittals, inspections, and punch list items. Tracks the full request-response lifecycle.

relatedEntityIds.description: IDs of affected entities (spaces, systems, envelopes, etc.)

bcfReference.description: BCF topic GUID for BIM issue linking

commissioning_test.description: Commissioning and acceptance test result entity (v2.0). Records actual test results for verification of requirements, system performance, and building handover.

testedEntityIds.description: IDs of entities being tested (systems, spaces, assets, etc.)

requirementIds.description: Requirements being verified by this test

issueId.description: Reference to issue entity for tracking

circulation_route.description: Circulation route entity (v2.0): defines egress and accessibility paths connecting spaces and vertical circulation elements. Used for fire safety compliance and accessibility verification.

routeName.description: Human-readable route name (e.g., Primary Egress Route A)

waypoints.description: Ordered sequence of spaces and circulation elements forming the route

isDecisionPoint.description: True if route branches at this point

maxTravelDistance.description: Maximum allowed travel distance per regulations in m

requiredWidth.description: Required minimum width per regulations in mm

isFireEscape.description: Route serves as designated fire escape

occupantCapacity.description: Number of occupants this route can evacuate

occupant_survey.description: Occupant feedback survey entity (v2.3). Structured Likert-scale + free-text responses from building occupants, scored across multiple comfort/satisfaction dimensions. Enables year-over-year trend reporting and links flagged dimensions to triggered Issues.

dimensions.description: One entry per scored dimension (e.g. thermal_comfort_winter, daylight, acoustic_privacy)

scaleMax.description: Top of the Likert scale, typically 5 or 7

percentSatisfied.description: Percentage of responses at or above the satisfaction threshold (typically >= 4 on 5-point scale)

flagged.description: True if dimension breached the project's satisfaction threshold and triggered follow-up

freeTextHighlights.description: Anonymised free-text responses that triggered or corroborated downstream actions

respondentApartmentId.description: Anonymised apartment identifier (do NOT use occupant name)

affectedEntityId.description: ID of space/system/asset the comment relates to

triggeredIssueId.description: ID of the operation-phase Issue this response triggered (if any). Null when the response didn't escalate.

energy_verification_record.description: In-use energy verification record (v2.3). The annual reconciliation of measured energy use against design predictions, normalised for actual occupancy/weather, with a verdict on energy class confirmation and per-factor delta attribution. Distinct from the design-phase simulationStrategy in project-specification (predictions) and from commissioning_test (point-in-time tests).

normalisedFor.description: Adjustments applied to make the measured year comparable to the design year

measured.description: Actual measured annual figures in kWh/(m2.year) unless noted otherwise

energyClass.description: Measured energy class (A, B, C, etc.)

deltaAnalysis.description: Per-factor attribution of any measured-vs-design delta

contribution_kWh_per_m2.description: Estimated contribution to the overall delta in kWh/(m2.year). Positive = adverse (more energy use)

attributedToEntityId.description: Generic entity attribution for non-asset factors (envelope, space, etc.)

retrocx_recommendation.description: Retro-commissioning recommendation (v2.3). The operation-phase pattern where measured performance triggers a corrective intervention without changing the hardware design. Distinct from generic Issue (no question / no design change / no non-conformance) — retro-cx has its own structured lifecycle: triggered by data, proposes an intervention, defines a measurable expected outcome, and ships a verification plan.

triggeredByIssueIds.description: Operation-phase Issues that motivated this recommendation

triggeredBySurveyId.description: Occupant survey that motivated this recommendation

triggeredByTelemetryStreamId.description: Telemetry stream whose threshold breach motivated this recommendation

expectedOutcome.description: The measurable target this intervention is expected to achieve

method.description: How the outcome will be verified

verificationTestId.description: Forward link to the commissioning_test that will verify the outcome (if any). Null when verification is informal or pending scheduling.

telemetry_stream.description: Time-series telemetry stream entity (v2.2). Represents a continuous numeric data stream from BMS, sub-meter, or IoT device, with a reference to the underlying data file/protocol plus human- or compiler-asserted summary statistics. Lets the SBM model carry operation-phase analytics that depend on actual measurements (CO2, runtime hours, energy use, etc.) rather than design predictions only.

sensorChannel.description: What this stream measures, e.g. co2_ppm, temperature_C, runtime_hours, energy_kWh

sourceDeviceId.description: Identifier of the source device (BMS point ID, IoT device serial, meter ID)

measuredEntityId.description: ID of the entity this stream measures

measuredEntityType.description: Type of the entity being measured

unit.description: Measurement unit (ppm, C, kWh, h, m3/h, etc.)

dataReference.description: Where the underlying time-series data lives

path.description: Filesystem path for file_*; topic/url for live protocols

fingerprint.description: Optional content hash (e.g. sha256:...) for file-based streams

summaryStatistics.description: Pre-computed or human-asserted summary statistics so the compiler can reason about the stream without reading every row

basis.description: Whether the summary numbers were asserted by an author or computed by the compiler from raw data

thresholds.description: Threshold checks (design targets, regulatory limits, alarm levels) and current breach state

coverage.description: Fraction of expected samples actually received (0-1)

permit.description: Regulatory permit / approval / administrative decision entity (v2.4). Models the formal authorizations a project must obtain (zoning decision, building permit, notification, occupancy permit, completion notice, heritage/environmental approvals, utility-connection conditions) including the issuing authority, statutory deadline, decision dates, conditions, and appeal/supersession chain. Captures 'how the building gets built' — the delivery & approval process layer.

permitType.description: Class of regulatory instrument. zoning_decision = Decyzja o warunkach zabudowy (WZ); local_plan_extract = wypis/wyrys z MPZP; notification = zgłoszenie; completion_notice = zawiadomienie o zakończeniu budowy; occupancy_permit = pozwolenie na użytkowanie.

status.description: Lifecycle state. silent_consent models the 'silence = consent' rule for zgłoszenie / completion-notice routes.

gatesPhase.description: Lifecycle phase this permit authorizes / must precede.

statutoryDeadlineDays.description: Statutory decision deadline in days (e.g. 65 building permit, 21 notification, 14 completion notice).

relatedEntityIds.description: IDs of building/site/campus entities this permit applies to

approval_gate.description: Phase-gate / decision milestone entity (v2.4). A go/no-go checkpoint in the delivery lifecycle (design freeze, permit-ready, start-on-site, commissioning-ready, completion authorized, operational readiness) with its decision owner, prerequisite checklist, deliverable references, and blocking issues. Makes lifecycle decision gates first-class and queryable.

regulatory_inspection.description: Statutory periodic inspection entity (v2.4). Models operation-phase regulatory inspections (annual / 5-year building inspections, chimney/ventilation, gas, electrical, fire-protection, lift) with their statutory basis, schedule, inspector, result + deficiencies, and a link to the digital building logbook (c-KOB — Cyfrowa Książka Obiektu Budowlanego). Captures 'how the building is operationally governed'.

statutoryBasis.description: Legal basis, e.g. 'Prawo Budowlane Art. 62 ust. 1 pkt 1'

frequencyMonths.description: Statutory inspection interval in months (e.g. 12 annual, 60 five-year).
